activities.summary: Anomalous reading detected on Pump-01 — value exceeded upper band.
Critical alert fired on Pump-01 — threshold exceeded on pump-01.
Anomalous reading detected on Valve-07 — value exceeded upper band.
J. Davies acknowledged alert on Pump-01.
Anomalous reading detected on Compressor-04 — value exceeded upper band.
J. Davies acknowledged alert on Valve-07.

Anomalous reading detected on Pump-04 — value exceeded upper band.
Critical alert fired on Valve-07 — threshold exceeded on valve-07.
Critical alert fired on Pump-09 — threshold exceeded on pump-09.
A. Kowalski acknowledged alert on Pump-09.
Pump-11 went offline at Site C – Cologne Plant. Connectivity lost.
Sensor-07 went offline at Site B – Bergen Offshore. Connectivity lost.
M. Schmidt raised the pressure threshold on Pump-04 from 125 to 130 bar.
R. Patel raised the pressure threshold on Valve-04 from 125 to 130 bar.
Compressor-01 came back online at Site E – Edmonton Mill.

Compressor-03 came back online at Site C – Cologne Plant.
